How It Works

Simple Process

From inquiry to delivery — we make buying HP products effortless

001

Inquiry

Contact us via WhatsApp or visit our showroom. Share your requirements and budget.

Share your requirements
Get instant recommendations
Receive best-price quotes
Visit Our Showroom

Experience HP at Sector 17

Step into our showroom at the heart of Chandigarh — SCO-12, 1st Floor, Sector-17-E, right above the iconic Indian Coffee House. Since 1989, we've been Chandigarh's trusted destination for HP products.

Jetage Computer Traders

SCO-12, 1st Floor, Sector-17-E
Chandigarh - 160017
Above Indian Coffee House

Mon-Sat: 10AM - 8PM

Why Jetage

The Jetage Advantage

Authorized HP World

Genuine HP products with full manufacturer warranty and official support. No grey market risks.

WhatsApp Ordering

Order instantly via WhatsApp. Get quotes, place orders, and track delivery — all on your phone.

Best Price Guarantee

We match and beat competitor prices. Exclusive deals you won't find on Amazon or Flipkart.

Expert Consultation

35+ years of tech expertise. We help you choose the right product for your exact needs.

All India Delivery

Fast, insured shipping across India. Special handling for fragile components.

After-Sales Support

Dedicated support for installation, setup, and troubleshooting. We're just a message away.
